sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3423" key="a)krathsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρατ-ησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n3423.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of control, incontinence</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σπέρματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.47</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
